## Completely Non-Functional - Multiple Critical Issues
I've had nothing but problems with Creatify since signing up. Here's what I experienced:

Avatar Generation Failure: My avatars have been stuck "in queue" for over 18 hours (and counting) after simply using the "change outfit" feature. Despite support claiming the issue was "resolved," the avatars still won't generate. I've been asked to recreate them multiple times with no success.

Broken Support Resources: The chatbot provided links to help articles that don't even exist - literally getting "Uh oh. That page doesn't exist" errors. How can customers self-serve when your documentation is broken? [...] Image 34

results.title: Creatify: The AI Video Ad Maker
results.content:
What impressed me most about AI Media Buyer is that it goes far beyond dashboards. It helps turn data into actionable decisions. From performance analysis and strategy recommendations to creative generation and optimization, it feels like a true AI co-worker rather than just another AI tool.

I’ve been fortunate to see this product evolve from the early days, helping refine the ads strategies behind it. Today, the quality of its recommendations is genuinely impressive, and it’s already become part of our internal workflow.

I truly believe AI Media Buyer is changing how paid advertising gets done. The future isn’t AI replacing marketers—it’s AI and marketers making better decisions together.

Huge congratulations to the Creatify team on the launch! 🚀

Report

12NextLast

•1 review [...] Maker

Hey Product Hunt, I'm Yinan, founder of Creatify.

Quick backstory: we've spent 3 years building Creatify. Started with URL to video, then avatars, Ad Clone, and a full creative agent. 3M+ users have used the platform.

But one thing kept bothering me. Our users would make great ads, launch them, then go back to staring at dashboards for hours trying to figure out what was working. The creative side was solved. The media buying side was still manual, scattered, and slow.

So we built AI Media Buyer an agent that plugs into your ad accounts and actually does the work.

How it runs: [...] 3.8

Based on 31 reviews

Review Creatify?

Reviewers split sharply on Creatify. Supporters say it makes ad videos fast and easy to produce, with an intuitive workflow, auto-generated scripts, captions, voiceover, and a wide avatar selection; small teams especially praise the time savings and helpful support. Repeated requests include clearer credit-use warnings, more editing control, better voice realism and lip-sync, and stronger consistency across ad variations. The strongest criticism is not features but billing: several users describe auto-renewal, no-refund disputes, and poor value when output quality or platform acceptance fell short.

Data driven. It has built-in optimization suggestions for improvements based on real performance metrics. Scalability. results.content:
Superscale

Superscale

# The only Creatify Review you'll ever need in 2026!

Creatify offers a broad feature set for AI video ads at competitive prices. However, inconsistent quality, locked features and a strict no-refund policy have caused significant frustration among users. Teams looking for a reliable partner that offers higher quality, higher consistency and bigger varieties will find more stability and better support with Superscale

## What is Creatify?

Creatify is an AI platform for creating video advertisements with digital avatars and automated product video generation. The software can automatically create video ads from product URLs. [...] One user describes their experience: After canceling the service, they continued to be charged despite not using the platform for months. The amount totaled several hundred dollars for a service that was long canceled.

### 2. Strict No-Refund Policy

Creatify enforces a strict no-refund policy that applies even for technical issues or non-use.

User reviews report: After trying to create several HD product videos, the platform loaded for hours and then showed error messages. Each attempt consumed over 20 credits, but support didn't respond to refund requests.

### 3. Lip-Sync and Avatar Issues

Avatar quality is inconsistent. Users report poor lip synchronization and unrealistic performance elements that make videos look unprofessional.

### 4. Slow Rendering Times [...] ## The Verdict: Is Creatify Worth It?

Creatify offers solid features at competitive prices, but the documented billing problems and lack of customer support are significant warning signs. The strict no-refund policy makes every purchase a risk. Lower quality than competitors for AI UGC Videos make Creatify look expensive in terms of cost/value.

For teams looking for a reliable partner with transparent pricing and good support, Superscale offers a safer alternative with a comparable feature set.

## Why do people switch to Superscale?

If you've been frustrated by fragmented workflows, billing issues, or the need to juggle multiple subscriptions just to produce a single ad, Superscale was built to solve exactly that problem.
